visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' branding, located in the front row, second from the left.
A green soda can with 'Sprite' branding, located in the front row, on the right.
A white can with purple and blue text, located on the far left of the front row.
A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind the red and green soda cans.
A brown paper bag standing in the background behind the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: Picking the first requested item, the coca-cola can. It is clear and directly accessible.
Picking the second requested item, the sprite can. It is also clear and directly accessible.
